description: Browser comparison agent — web_search and fetch_url cannot reliably handle JS-rendered pages, filters, dropdowns, tabs, forms, or multi-step flows. Use the browser skill for interactive comparison tasks (≥3 visible actions) plus an 8-section replay report.

submission_outline.title: Anchor mission
submission_outline.summary: Primary comparison benchmark — filter, sort, open cards, distil a comparison table, export the 8-section replay.

submission_outline.title: Marketplace maze
submission_outline.summary: Search forms, price sliders, and sort toggles on live commerce and ticketing sites.

submission_outline.title: Cross-site dossiers
submission_outline.summary: Hop across official sites — pricing tabs, institute listings, multi-step flows.

submission_outline.title: Cascade laboratory
submission_outline.summary: Same browser skill, cheapest correct path wins: extract → deterministic → a11y → vision → blocked.

design_queries.title: Browser comparison agent + replay viewer
requirements: web_search/fetch_url fail on JS-rendered pages, click-revealed widgets, filters, and multi-step flows — use browser.
Complete a real comparison on the live web — filters, dropdowns, sort, tabs, forms, or multi-step flows.
At least three visible browser actions — not passive search snippets.
Structured comparison table plus 8-section replay: goal, DAG, path, actions, page logs, data, table, cost.
Orchestrator unchanged — browser skill plugs in via skill catalogue only.
design_queries.verify: Run COMP from Tasks; Graph & Replay → Replay report. Or Open COMP replay demo.

browser_findings.canvas_heavy_a11y_wins: Six real canvas-heavy targets predicted to need vision all resolved on a11y via the natural cascade.
browser_findings.vision_only_on_adversarial_fixture: Vision path required only for B4 (canvas-only.html), built to defeat a11y.
browser_findings.architecture: User goal → planner → researcher (optional URL discovery) → browser (extract → deterministic → a11y → vision → blocked) → distiller → critic → formatter → replay viewer. Gateway blocked → recover or report.
browser_findings.creative_patterns: DEAL/TICKET stress filters on one site; STACK/FORGE stress multi-site pricing or institute listings with hidden detail pages.

queries.label: COMP
queries.title: Hugging Face likes leaderboard
queries.query: Compare the top 3 Hugging Face text-generation models: go to https://huggingface.co/models, filter by text-generation, filter by transformers, sort by most likes, open the top three model cards, and return a structured comparison table (model name, likes, one-line description). Use the browser skill with at least three visible actions (filter, sort, open cards). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: Primary demo — dropdown filters + sort + model cards.
queries.verify_hint: Path likely a11y; replay shows ≥3 actions + comparison table.

queries.label: DEAL
queries.title: Midnight laptop hunt — Flipkart
queries.query: Compare 3 laptops under ₹80,000 on Flipkart: go to https://www.flipkart.com, search for laptop, apply a price filter up to ₹80,000, sort by customer rating, open three product detail pages, and return a comparison table (name, price, CPU/RAM highlight, rating). Use the browser skill with at least three visible actions (search, filter or sort, open product pages). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: E-commerce maze — search box, price facet, product cards.
queries.verify_hint: Table with price + spec; replay logs filter/sort clicks.

queries.label: TICKET
queries.title: IMAX showdown — BookMyShow
queries.query: Compare 3 IMAX showtimes in Bengaluru on BookMyShow: go to https://in.bookmyshow.com, set city to Bengaluru, search for a currently running blockbuster film, narrow to IMAX or premium large-format showtimes if the site offers that filter, and open three different theatre showtime pages. Return a comparison table with columns: movie name, theatre name, show time, ticket price, screen format (exactly three distinct theatres). At least three visible browser actions (city/search, format filter or sort, open showtimes). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: Ticketing UI — city picker, movie search, showtime grid.
queries.verify_hint: Three theatres or slots with price; multi-click navigation in replay.

queries.label: STACK
queries.title: AI copilot price wars
queries.query: Compare 5 AI coding assistants by free plan vs paid plan: use the browser to visit official pricing pages for Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codeium, Tabnine, and Continue.dev. On each site, open the pricing page and expand tiers or switch billing tabs as needed. Return a structured comparison table (tool, free tier summary, paid starting price). At least three visible browser actions across the sites. Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: Cross-site dossier — pricing tabs, accordions, tier toggles.
queries.verify_hint: Multi-page flow; free vs paid columns in final table.

queries.label: FORGE
queries.title: CNC/VMC craft schools — Bangalore
queries.query: Compare 5 CNC/VMC training institutes in Bangalore: use the browser to open a training institute directory or course listings site, search for CNC or VMC programs in Bangalore, apply a city or location filter, open five institute or course detail pages, and return a comparison table (institute name, course duration, approximate fee, certification offered). At least three visible browser actions (search, filter, open detail pages). Do not use search snippets only.
queries.ui_hint: Training listings — search, location filter, institute detail drill-down.
queries.verify_hint: Five institutes with fee/duration; multi-click navigation in replay.

queries.label: B1
queries.title: Ghost layer — Hacker News extract
queries.query: Using the browser skill, fetch https://news.ycombinator.com and summarize the top story listings.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 1 — httpx + trafilatura, no Playwright turns.

queries.label: B2
queries.title: Selector sniper — Amazon SKU
queries.query: Using browser, search Amazon for a laptop and extract title, price, brand, and description from the top product page.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 2a — CSS selectors on a product detail page.

queries.label: B3
queries.title: Dropdown diplomat — HF filters
queries.query: Go to https://huggingface.co/models, filter by text-generation, filter by transformers, sort by most likes, and read the top three model cards.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 2b — a11y tree + LLM turns (same site family as COMP).

queries.label: B4
queries.title: Red circle ritual — vision only
queries.query: Open sandbox/browser/canvas-only.html via browser. Click inside the red circle. Do not guess.
queries.ui_hint: Layer 3 — set-of-marks after a11y returns an empty tree.
